scripts.build:pwa: npm -w @viberun/shared run build && npm -w @viberun/mobile-pwa run build
scripts.build:companion: npm -w @viberun/shared run build && npm -w @viberun/companion run build
scripts.build:all: npm -w @viberun/shared run build && npm -w @viberun/mobile-pwa run build && npm -w @viberun/companion run build && npm -w @viberun/generated-template run build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:all
